title: Aerospace supplier dependency and quality-risk graph
reason: OEMs and Tier-1s are exposed to multi-tier supplier delays, quality escapes and traceability gaps. A graph-based supplier-risk system can map bottlenecks, certifications, lead times and capacity.

title: Certification evidence OS for aerospace software and hardware
reason: Certification is a structural bottleneck. A tool that manages evidence, requirements, traceability, testing artifacts and regulator-ready packages can serve OEMs, suppliers and startups.

title: Engine MRO capacity and parts intelligence platform
reason: Engine MRO capacity and spare parts are red bottlenecks for airline uptime. A platform can forecast shop visits, parts constraints, slot availability and fleet readiness.

title: Aerospace spares and aftermarket FinOps
reason: Aftermarket costs, parts scarcity and fleet availability drive airline economics. A spend/availability intelligence layer can optimize spares, repair decisions and contracts.

title: Avionics and connected-aircraft cyber assurance layer
reason: Aircraft, satcom, MRO and airline systems are increasingly connected. A cyber assurance layer for aviation software, connectivity, maintenance data and vendor risk has strong B2B value.

title: SAF procurement and traceability platform
reason: SAF adoption depends on supply availability, certification, carbon accounting and logistics. A platform can help airlines, airports and corporates manage SAF claims and procurement.

title: Airspace disruption and airline operations intelligence
reason: Congestion, weather, airspace constraints and airport capacity affect airline economics. A real-time operational intelligence layer can serve dispatch, network planning and risk teams.

title: Launch access and satellite deployment intelligence
reason: Satellite operators depend on launch cadence, pricing, range access and mission integration. A launch market intelligence tool can help satellite builders and operators plan deployment paths.

title: Ground segment and satellite operations observability
reason: Satellite constellations need ground segment, anomaly detection, network operations and data routing. A software layer can serve operators without building satellites.

title: Digital thread for aerospace SMEs and suppliers
reason: Aerospace suppliers struggle with requirements, changes, quality documents, configuration and traceability. A lightweight digital-thread tool can target SMEs below PLM giants.

title: Hydrogen airport and aircraft-readiness assessment platform
reason: Hydrogen aviation needs airports, storage, safety, certification and operations readiness. A planning platform can help airports, OEMs and public agencies prepare before aircraft arrive.

title: Aerospace opportunity radar for founders and investors
reason: The aerospace stack has hidden B2B opportunity zones across MRO, certification, supply chain, space, SAF, software and cyber. The graph itself can become a founder/VC opportunity engine.
